Let me start by reading the file to understand the full context.

Now let me analyze what needs to be done:

**Migration Rule**: `sd-cf-descriptionlist-descriptionlist-req-group` — This rule says that `<DescriptionList>` must contain `<DescriptionListGroup>` as its children. In PF v6, `DescriptionList` requires `DescriptionListGroup` wrapping.

**Current structure**:
```jsx
<DescriptionList className="pf-v6-c-description-list">
  <VirtualMachineDescriptionItem ... />
  <VirtualMachineDescriptionItem ... />
  <VirtualMachineDescriptionItem ... />
  <VirtualMachineDescriptionItem ... />
</DescriptionList>
```

**Required structure**: Each `VirtualMachineDescriptionItem` (or group of them) should be wrapped in `<DescriptionListGroup>`. Looking at the code, each `VirtualMachineDescriptionItem` represents an independent description item, so each should be wrapped in its own `<DescriptionListGroup>`.

However, I need to consider what `VirtualMachineDescriptionItem` actually renders. It's a custom component that likely renders `DescriptionListTerm` + `DescriptionListDescription` internally. The conformance rule just requires that `DescriptionList` contains `DescriptionListGroup`. The simplest correct fix is to wrap each `VirtualMachineDescriptionItem` in a `<DescriptionListGroup>`.

I also notice the className uses `pf-v5-c-description-list` in the rule description but the actual file already has `pf-v6-c-description-list` — so that's already been updated.

Let me also note that I also need to update the `className` — actually looking at the file, it already says `pf-v6-c-description-list`. But since `DescriptionList` in PF v6 applies its own CSS class, the explicit `className="pf-v6-c-description-list"` is redundant. However, the migration rule doesn't mention removing it, so I'll leave it as-is and focus only on the conformance rule.

Let me apply the fix:

1. Add `DescriptionListGroup` to the import from `@patternfly/react-core`
2. Wrap each `VirtualMachineDescriptionItem` in a `<DescriptionListGroup>`

arguments.after:
<DescriptionList className="pf-v6-c-description-list">
        <DescriptionListGroup>
          <VirtualMachineDescriptionItem
            descriptionData={
              <NodeSelectorDetailItem nodeSelector={vm?.spec?.template?.spec?.nodeSelector} />
            }
            onEditClick={() =>
              createModal(({ isOpen, onClose }) => (
                <NodeSelectorModal
                  isOpen={isOpen}
                  nodes={nodes}
                  nodesLoaded={nodesLoaded}
                  onClose={onClose}
                  onSubmit={onSubmit}
                  vm={vm}
                />
              ))
            }
            data-test-id="node-selector"
            descriptionHeader={<SearchItem id="node-selector">{t('Node selector')}</SearchItem>}
            isEdit={canUpdateVM}
          />
        </DescriptionListGroup>
        <DescriptionListGroup>
          <VirtualMachineDescriptionItem
            onEditClick={() =>
              createModal(({ isOpen, onClose }) => (
                <TolerationsModal
                  isOpen={isOpen}
                  nodes={nodes}
                  nodesLoaded={nodesLoaded}
                  onClose={onClose}
                  onSubmit={onSubmit}
                  vm={vm}
                  vmi={vmi}
                />
              ))
            }
            data-test-id="tolerations"
            descriptionData={<Tolerations vm={vm} />}
            descriptionHeader={<SearchItem id="tolerations">{t('Tolerations')}</SearchItem>}
            isEdit={canUpdateVM}
          />
        </DescriptionListGroup>
        <DescriptionListGroup>
          <VirtualMachineDescriptionItem
            onEditClick={() =>
              createModal(({ isOpen, onClose }) => (
                <AffinityModal
                  isOpen={isOpen}
                  nodes={nodes}
                  nodesLoaded={nodesLoaded}
                  onClose={onClose}
                  onSubmit={onSubmit}
                  vm={vm}
                />
              ))
            }
            data-test-id="affinity-rules"
            descriptionData={<Affinity vm={vm} />}
            descriptionHeader={<SearchItem id="affinity">{t('Affinity rules')}</SearchItem>}
            isEdit={canUpdateVM}
          />
        </DescriptionListGroup>
        <DescriptionListGroup>
          <VirtualMachineDescriptionItem
            bodyContent={<DeschedulerPopover />}
            data-test-id="descheduler"
            descriptionData={<Descheduler vm={vm} />}
            descriptionHeader={<SearchItem id="descheduler">{t('Descheduler')}</SearchItem>}
            isPopover
          />
        </DescriptionListGroup>
      </DescriptionList>

<DescriptionList className="pf-v6-c-description-list">
        <VirtualMachineDescriptionItem

          }

        />
        <VirtualMachineDescriptionItem
          onEditClick={() =>

              <TolerationsModal

                nodes={nodes}

                vmi={vmi}

          isEdit={canUpdateVM}

        <VirtualMachineDescriptionItem

          isEdit={canUpdateVM}

        <VirtualMachineDescriptionItem

          isPopover
        />
      </DescriptionList>
